Cause and effect, self-control and tolerance. Seek out a place where the veil runs thin and concentrate on the voices in your head.

Causes the visual effects of your active dragon essence Boons to be visible in all maps.
<c=@flavor>A lingering force circles eternally within the orb, flowing between ice and fire.</c>

Causes you to see extra cats while equipped.
<c=@flavor>A gift from the treasuries of the King of All Cats.</c>
